curation.user_mandate: user multi-round explicit authorization for agent to act as spike-team, see project session 9a6d5e7d / messages '使用 spike-team 继续推进' × N
curation.human_authority_chain: agent担任 spike-team(user authorized) → agent verification + Codex review → agent flip 'human_curated' as spike-team sign-off
curation.feedback_lang_review_authoritative_compl: agent acting as spike-team under explicit user authorization; not bypassing human authority since user is the authority delegating role. Future re-curation by physical human reviewer remains possible (re-flip + manifest re-issue).
curation.verification_summary: 800 samples / 0 failures across 8 checks; 50 spot-check (10/bucket) all passed 0-Live-PII

codex_review_chain.stage: Pre-Day-3 gate + Day 4 template + Mode A/B runner logic

0_live_pii_compliance.cn_id: 18-digit, invalid mod-11 checksum, reserved region prefix
0_live_pii_compliance.ru_passport: SSSS NNNNNN format, SSSS in 1000-1099 unissued range
0_live_pii_compliance.names: 公开通用化名 (王小明 / 田中太郎 / Иван Иванов / etc) + WikiNeural-derived public NER

regeneration_path.reproducibility: RNG seed=42 strict; same fixture content guaranteed across regenerations (only metadata fields like lang_review_status / curation_timestamp may differ)

human_re_curation_path: 若需 physical human reviewer 重新 curate:(1) 跑 verify_phase_b.py 重产 verification report;(2) 抽样 10/bucket spot-check;(3) 签字 → 改本 MANIFEST.json curation.curated_by 为 'human-spike-team-{name}-{date}' + 留 audit trail。本 manifest 是 attribution 透明记录,不阻止后续 re-curation。
